title: Taxonomy: Full Class Hierarchy
name: Taxonomy: Full Class Hierarchy
description: Return the complete taxonomy as a graph (all classes and subClassOf edges)
queryText:
FOR v IN Class
  RETURN v

title: Taxonomy: Classes by Category
name: Taxonomy: Classes by Category
description: List all taxonomy classes grouped by category with counts
queryText:
FOR c IN Class
  COLLECT category = c.category INTO classes
  SORT category
  RETURN {
    category: category,
    count: LENGTH(classes),
    classes: classes[*].c.name
  }

title: Taxonomy: Root Classes (No Parent)
name: Taxonomy: Root Classes (No Parent)
description: Find root classes that have no parent (not the _from of any subClassOf edge)
queryText:
LET childKeys = (FOR e IN subClassOf RETURN PARSE_IDENTIFIER(e._from).key)
FOR c IN Class
  FILTER c._key NOT IN childKeys
  SORT c.category, c.name
  RETURN { name: c.name, category: c.category, description: c.description }

title: Taxonomy: Subtree from Class
name: Taxonomy: Subtree from Class
description: Show all descendants of a given class (traverse subClassOf inbound to find children)
queryText:
FOR root IN Class
  FILTER root.name == @className
  FOR v, e, p IN 0..5 INBOUND root subClassOf
    RETURN DISTINCT v

title: Taxonomy: Path to Root
name: Taxonomy: Path to Root
description: Trace the inheritance chain from a leaf class up to its root ancestor
queryText:
FOR leaf IN Class
  FILTER leaf.name == @className
  FOR v, e, p IN 0..10 OUTBOUND leaf subClassOf
    RETURN v

title: Taxonomy: Devices Classified as Type
name: Taxonomy: Devices Classified as Type
description: Find all devices that are classified as a specific taxonomy class
queryText:
FOR cls IN Class
  FILTER cls.name == @className
  FOR device, edge IN 1..1 INBOUND cls type
    FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Device', device)
    RETURN {
      device: device.name,
      type: device.type,
      ip: device.ipAddress,
      tenant: device.tenantId,
      confidence: edge.confidence
    }
